name: superdev
description: Superdev — a workspace-scope-agnostic, package-manager-agnostic, self-improving Claude Code plugin bundling 13 skills and 49 subagents for full-stack monorepo builds. v1.3.0 adds opinionated frontend modular architecture (no god-files, dedicated Zustand stores per module, sub-sub-components in parts/<name>/ folders with shadcn Portal primitives) and atomic one-module refactoring (single-commit conversion with zero-drift verification and hard rollback).

plugins.name: superdev
plugins.description: 14 production-grade skills + 49 specialized subagents for full-stack monorepo builds. Workspace-scope and package-manager agnostic. Self-improving via .claude/memory/superdev-learned/. v1.4.0 makes completion ENFORCED: a Definition-of-Done Stop gate (done-gate.sh + COMPLETION_LEDGER.json + superdev-done skill) blocks any premature 'done' while typecheck/lint/build/integration/completeness/security/qa/brutal are red; the wave gate blocks lint errors + new suppressions; and the self-learning loop now actually fires. v1.3.0 adds frontend-modular-architecture + frontend-refactoring. Other skills: prd-design-build-orchestrator, design-to-nextjs, design-preservation, nestjs-enterprise-backend, security-review-and-fix, prototype-to-saas, exploratory-qa, systematic-debugging, product-completeness-audit, brutal-exhaustive-audit, superdev-self-learning.
